allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message | Select-Object -First 3 })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Server UP - HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Server DOWN: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/pricepulse" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
